name: Email Monetization Engine
description: Turn your email list into a consistent revenue stream with proven sequences and promotional campaigns
outcome: $1,000–$5,000 in email-driven revenue per launch cycle

automation.followUp: Add to broadcast list after sequence completes

automation.action: Segment non-openers for resend with new subject line after 48h
automation.followUp: Send cart close sequence to non-buyers on final day

assets.title: Nurture Sequence — Email 1: Welcome
assets.content:
Subject: You're in — here's what to expect

Hey [First Name],

Welcome to the [LIST NAME] community.

I'm [YOUR NAME] — [one sentence on who you are and who you help].

You signed up for [what they opted in for] and I'm sending it to you right now:
[LINK TO LEAD MAGNET OR RESOURCE]

Over the next week, I'll also be sharing:
→ [Email 2 topic — a quick win]
→ [Email 3 topic — a common mistake to avoid]
→ [Email 4 topic — your method or framework]
→ And more.

These are my most popular, most-replied-to emails. I think you'll find them useful.

One quick question before I go:

What made you sign up today? What are you working on or trying to figure out?

Hit reply — I read every single response and often send personalized tips back.

Talk soon,
[Your Name]

P.S. Add [your email] to your contacts so my emails don't end up in spam. It takes 2 seconds and ensures you don't miss anything.

assets.title: Nurture Sequence — Email 3: The Quick Win
assets.content:
Subject: The fastest way to [desired outcome]

Hey [First Name],

Let me give you something you can use today.

The fastest way I know to [ACHIEVE THE THING YOUR AUDIENCE WANTS]:

[THE QUICK WIN — be specific, actionable, and keep it under 200 words]

Example structure:
"1. [Step 1 — takes 5 minutes]
2. [Step 2 — takes 10 minutes]
3. [Step 3 — the payoff]

Most people skip step [X] — that's where the difference is."

Try this today and hit reply to tell me what happened.

[Your Name]

P.S. Tomorrow I'm going to share the #1 mistake I see [your audience] make with [topic]. It's one of those things you can't unsee once you know it.

assets.title: Offer Reveal Email
assets.content:
Subject: Here's what I've been building for you

Hey [First Name],

For the past [timeframe], you've been getting my best [tips/content/strategies] on [topic].

Today I want to tell you about something I've put together for people who want to go deeper.

Introducing: [OFFER NAME]

[OFFER NAME] is [what it is — course, service, template, system] designed specifically for [your audience] who want to [desired outcome] without [the pain they're trying to avoid].

Here's what's inside:
✅ [Deliverable/Feature 1] — [1-sentence benefit]
✅ [Deliverable/Feature 2] — [1-sentence benefit]
✅ [Deliverable/Feature 3] — [1-sentence benefit]
✅ [Bonus] — [1-sentence benefit]

Who this is for:
→ [Ideal customer description 1]
→ [Ideal customer description 2]
→ [Ideal customer description 3]

Who this is NOT for:
→ [Exclusion 1 — keep it honest]
→ [Exclusion 2]

Investment: [PRICE]
[If limited: only X spots available / cart closes [DATE]]

Get the details and join here:
[SALES PAGE LINK]

Any questions? Hit reply — I'll answer every one personally.

[Your Name]

P.S. [Something that creates urgency or reinforces the key benefit in one sentence]

assets.title: Promotional Campaign — Cart Close Email
assets.content:
Subject: Last chance — closes at midnight

Hey [First Name],

This is it.

[OFFER NAME] closes tonight at midnight [timezone].

After that, [the price goes up / doors close / this bonus disappears].

If you've been on the fence, here's what I want you to know:

[MOST COMMON OBJECTION + HONEST RESPONSE]
Example: "If you're worried it won't work for your situation — I get it. Here's what I'll say: [brief, direct response to their specific fear]."

Here's what people who joined are already saying:
"[TESTIMONIAL — specific and recent if possible]"
— [Name, role]

This is your last chance to get [the specific benefit] at [current price].

→ Join [OFFER NAME] before midnight: [LINK]

If now's not the right time, no hard feelings. I'll keep showing up in your inbox with value regardless.

[Your Name]

P.S. If you have a question that's keeping you from saying yes — reply to this email right now. I'm monitoring this inbox until close and I'll answer you personally.

assets.title: Re-Engagement Campaign (Cold Subscribers)
assets.content:
Subject: Are you still there, [First Name]?

Hey [First Name],

I noticed you haven't opened my emails in a while.

Which is fine — life gets busy, inboxes get messy.

But before I move you to a less frequent list, I want to make sure you're getting what you actually came here for.

Quick question:

What's the #1 thing you're trying to figure out in your [business/life/niche] right now?

A) [Topic/Problem 1]
B) [Topic/Problem 2]
C) [Topic/Problem 3]
D) Something else (just reply and tell me)

Based on your answer, I'll send you the most useful thing I have on that topic — no fluff.

If you'd rather I just stop emailing — no hurt feelings. Click here to unsubscribe: [UNSUBSCRIBE LINK]

But if you're still in — hit reply with A, B, C, or D and let's make sure I'm actually useful to you.

[Your Name]

P.S. People who reply to this email tend to become my most engaged subscribers. Something about the conversation that re-ignites the connection. Worth a shot.

assets.title: Revenue Tracking Guide
assets.content:
EMAIL REVENUE TRACKING GUIDE

KEY METRICS TO TRACK (monthly)

1. LIST SIZE & GROWTH
• Current subscribers: ____
• New this month: ____
• Unsubscribes this month: ____
• Net growth: ____
Target: 10–20% monthly growth for early-stage lists

2. ENGAGEMENT METRICS
• Average open rate: ____%
• Average click rate: ____%
• Reply rate (estimate): ____%
Benchmarks: 30%+ open rate = healthy | 2-3%+ click rate = engaged

3. REVENUE METRICS
• Revenue per email sent: $____
• Revenue per subscriber (monthly): $____
• Best performing email this month: ____
• Worst performing: ____
Target: $1–$3/subscriber/month is strong for solopreneurs

4. CAMPAIGN PERFORMANCE
For each promo campaign, track:
• Emails in sequence: ____
• Total opens: ____
• Total clicks: ____
• Revenue generated: $____
• Conversion rate (sales / clicks): ____%

5. WHAT TO OPTIMIZE FIRST
If open rate is low → fix subject lines
If click rate is low → fix calls to action
If revenue is low → fix offer clarity or pricing
If list isn't growing → fix lead magnet or opt-in visibility

6. SIMPLE MONTHLY REVIEW QUESTIONS
• What email got the most replies this month? Why?
• What offer performed best? What can I learn from that?
• What would I do differently next month?
• What's my email revenue goal for next month? $_____
